Ready... Set... Participate! Welcome to Reveel Campaigns!

Reveel Campaigns

Welcome to Reveel Campaigns!

Reveel Campaigns is about facilitating participation in the onchain economy and partnering with amazing brands, creators, & communities to provide unique opportunities to the Reveel community!

This commemorative NFT will allow holders to unlock rewards in our very first Reveel Campaign!

Mint 'Ready... Set... Participate! Welcome to Reveel Campaigns!' and celebrate this big milestone as we continue to innovate & expand our reach into the onchain economy.

Coinbase Wallet app

Connect with your self-custody wallet

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
